segments.text: والحمد لله كثيرا وسبحان الله بكره واصيلا
لا اله الا الله وحده صدق وعده ونصر عبده
ولا نعبد الا اياه مخلصين له الدين ولو
دي براز سيسترز بروفيت محمد صلى الله عليه
والحمد لله كثيرا وسبحان الله بكره واصيلا

واعز جنده وهزم الاحزاب وحده لا اله الا

summary: This video presents the traditional takbirs (glorifications of Allah) recited during Eid al-Adha. The content consists of repetitive recitations of "Allahu Akbar" (Allah is Greatest) along with other Islamic phrases praising Allah, testifying to His oneness, acknowledging His promises and support, and sending blessings upon Prophet Muhammad and his family. The speaker emphasizes the importance of adorning the Eid celebration with takbir, which is a fundamental practice during this blessed Islamic holiday.
suggested_title: Takbirs of Eid al-Adha - Traditional Glorifications of Allah
